Liquid Euphoria.name: 液态狂喜 Liquid Euphoria
Liquid Euphoria.description:
启动 交互

熟练的炼金术士可以从欣快泥浆怪中提取油脂，制成一种易燃液体，其蒸气可被吸入以获得强烈的快乐，尽管副作用可能很糟。

豁免 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

潜伏期 1分钟

最大持续时间 1小时

阶段 1 对抗恐惧与情绪效果的意志豁免获得+2物品加值（10分钟）

阶段 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}，@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2}（1分钟）

阶段 3 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}（1小时）

Activate Interact

Skilled alchemists can extract the oil from a euphoria ooze to make a flammable liquid whose vapors can be inhaled for intense joy, though the side effects can be nasty.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:21]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 1 hour

Stage 1 +2 item bonus to Will saves against fear and emotion effects (10 minutes)

Stage 2 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused} (1 hour)
